listitem.para: The username associated with this connection. The username can be the &IKEv1; XAUTH username, a GSSAPI username or &IKEv2; CP username. For the XAUTH username, the XAUTH password can be configured in the file &ipsec.secrets.5;.
History: the parameter was originally called xauthusername=; it was renamed to username= in &Libreswan; 3.17.
